overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded protagonist walking through a sunlit historic Islamic city. The character navigates a central courtyard with fountains, ascends stone stairs to a busy street with camel traffic, and returns via a side path, showcasing detailed sandstone architecture and vibrant market life.

events.description: camel with rider passes from left to right across the courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard, circling around the central fountain while observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: camel being led by a rider walking across the courtyard

entered.detail: octagonal stone fountain with water jets in the center of the courtyard
historic sandstone building with arched doorways and decorative blue trim
intricate geometric tile patterns on the courtyard floor
large terracotta pots with flowering plants

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit central courtyard featuring an octagonal stone fountain. The ground is covered in decorative geometric tiles, and sandstone buildings with arched doorways surround the space. A camel with a rider passes by on the left as the character moves toward a stone staircase in the distance.

events.description: exits open courtyard and enters narrow stone staircase
emerges from stairway into bright sunlight with full view of green domes

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs toward the upper street level

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with worn steps leading upward
large building with distinctive green domes and gold finials visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the courtyard and ascends a narrow stone staircase flanked by sandstone walls. Upon reaching the top, the view opens to reveal a grand building with green domes in the distance, and the lighting shifts to bright, direct sunlight.

events.description: camel caravan and horse riders pass by in both directions
character turns right to enter a side street

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy street, navigating through pedestrians and animal traffic

notable_agents.action: camel with rider moving along the street

entered.detail: large decorative stone archway spanning the street
multi-story sandstone building with wooden balconies and blue flowering vines

segments.scene_description: Walking along a bustling street, the character passes under a grand stone archway while camels and horses navigate through the crowd. The green-domed building remains visible to the left, and sandstone buildings with wooden balconies line the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: side path with water feature returning to plaza

events.description: turns off main street onto quieter side path with rectangular pool
re-enters the central plaza area with the octagonal fountain

agents.ego_description: walking along the side path, passing the water pool and returning toward the central fountain

entered.detail: long rectangular pool with clear water and stone edges
scattered pink flower petals on the stone pavement
octagonal stone fountain with water jets in the center of the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character turns onto a quieter side path featuring a rectangular water pool on the right. After walking past flowering bushes and scattered petals, the character returns to the central plaza, with the octagonal fountain coming back into view ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene central courtyard through a bustling city street and back again. It begins with the character walking across decorative geometric tiles past an octagonal stone fountain, moving toward a distant staircase as a rider on a camel passes by. As the character ascends the narrow stone stairs, the enclosed sandstone walls give way to a wide vista of bright, direct sunlight and a grand building with green domes. The scene then opens into a crowded street where the camera passes under a stone archway amidst horses and camels, flanked by buildings with wooden balconies. Finally, the path shifts into a quieter side alley lined with flowering bushes and a rectangular pool before turning back toward the central plaza and its octagonal fountain.
